_comment: Canonical CLASSIC RULESET config for Latimer-Woods-Tech/Factory ruleset id 15843812 (target: main via ~DEFAULT_BRANCH). Source of truth for the apply-sec-hardening.yml workflow's ruleset dimension. This file is PUT to https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/rulesets/15843812. NOTE: This is SEPARATE from main-branch-protection.json — that file targets the legacy /branches/main/protection API; this targets the newer /rulesets API. The audit (#602) §3 calls out that we currently have BOTH mechanisms and §7 recommendation #4 is to pick one. STEP 1 OF CONSOLIDATION (2026-05-25): this ruleset now matches-or-exceeds the legacy protection on every dimension (dependency-review added to required_status_checks; required_review_thread_resolution enabled). STEP 2 (separate PR after soak period): disable enforcement on the legacy /branches/main/protection mechanism and remove its half from apply-sec-hardening.yml. The required_status_checks contexts MUST be the bare check job names (e.g. `validate`, `Analyze (javascript)`) — same contract as main-branch-protection.json. To change the ruleset: edit this file in a PR; the scheduled workflow will PUT it on next run (or run apply-sec-hardening.yml manually). Bypass actors: actor_id 5 = repo Admin role (RepositoryRole); actor_id 3560471 = factory-cross-repo App (Integration). Do not change bypass actors without coordination — apply-sec-hardening uses the App token to PUT this file.
name: main
